name: Form Field
title: Form Field / Select With Helper Error
summary: Composes a required label, semantic select, helper copy, and inline error messaging into a reusable field-level pattern.

props.name: title
props.default: Form Field / Select With Helper Error
props.description: Pattern title shown in the demo surface.

props.name: description
props.default: Use this when the field needs clear context, required state, helper guidance, and inline validation feedback in a single consistent block.
props.description: Supporting copy shown above the field.

props.name: helper
props.default: Select the state in which you were born, not the state in which you currently reside.
props.description: Helper copy shown below the field.

props.name: error
props.default: You must select a state before continuing.
